name: Manual Call Point
shortDescription: Resettable break-glass call point for manual alarm activation.
longDescription: Manual call points let anyone raise the alarm immediately on discovering a fire. This resettable unit uses a plastic operating element rather than real glass, so it can be tested and reset with a key instead of replacing a broken pane — a meaningful saving across a site with dozens of points.

images.alt: Manual Call Point supplied by Expert Safety Solutions, Vadodara
